title: Support array pattern concatentaion
body:
Full test module is attached. Here is an example of the features our sv code base uses.
```verilog
   localparam logic [31:0] BASE_ADDRS[3] = '{32'h80001000, 32'h80002000, 32'h80003000};

   // Sub-array slice at the start
   localparam logic [31:0] ALL_ADDRS[4] = '{BASE_ADDRS[0:1], 32'h80003000, 32'h80004000};

   // Sub-array slice in the middle
   localparam logic [31:0] MID[5] = '{32'hFF, BASE_ADDRS[0:1], 32'hAA, 32'hBB};

   // Multiple full sub-arrays
   localparam logic [31:0] EXTRA[2] = '{32'hC0, 32'hD0};
   localparam logic [31:0] MULTI[5] = '{BASE_ADDRS, EXTRA};
```

> What output from that test indicates it is wrong, and what is the correct or expected output?  (Or, please make test self-checking if possible.)
```
vlt/t_array_pattern_concat: ==================================================
	perl /verilator/test_regress/../bin/verilator --prefix Vt_array_pattern_concat -cc -Mdir obj_vlt/t_array_pattern_concat --fdedup --debug-check --comp-limit-members 10 --x-assign unique --exe ../obj_vlt/t_array_pattern_concat/Vt_array_pattern_concat__main.cpp -f input.vc +define+TEST_OBJ_DIR=obj_vlt/t_array_pattern_concat +define+TEST_DUMPFILE=obj_vlt/t_array_pattern_concat/simx.vcd t/t_array_pattern_concat.v   > obj_vlt/t_array_pattern_concat/vlt_compile.log
%Error: t/t_array_pattern_concat.v:19:43: Assignment pattern missed initializing elements: 3
                                        : ... note: In instance 't'
   19 |    localparam logic [31:0] ALL_ADDRS[4] = '{BASE_ADDRS[0:1], 32'h80003000, 32'h80004000};
      |                                           ^~
        ... See the manual at https://verilator.org/verilator_doc.html?v=5.047 for more assistance.
%Error: t/t_array_pattern_concat.v:22:37: Assignment pattern missed initializing elements: 4
                                        : ... note: In instance 't'
   22 |    localparam logic [31:0] MID[5] = '{32'hFF, BASE_ADDRS[0:1], 32'hAA, 32'hBB};
      |                                     ^~
%Error: t/t_array_pattern_concat.v:26:39: Assignment pattern missed initializing elements: 2
                                        : ... note: In instance 't'
   26 |    localparam logic [31:0] MULTI[5] = '{BASE_ADDRS, EXTRA};
      |                                       ^~
%Error: t/t_array_pattern_concat.v:26:39: Assignment pattern missed initializing elements: 3
                                        : ... note: In instance 't'
   26 |    localparam logic [31:0] MULTI[5] = '{BASE_ADDRS, EXTRA};
      |                                       ^~
%Error: t/t_array_pattern_concat.v:26:39: Assignment pattern missed initializing elements: 4
                                        : ... note: In instance 't'
   26 |    localparam logic [31:0] MULTI[5] = '{BASE_ADDRS, EXTRA};
      |                                       ^~
%Error: t/t_array_pattern_concat.v:30:43: Assignment pattern missed initializing elements: 2
                                        : ... note: In instance 't'
   30 |    localparam logic [31:0] WITH_DFLT[4] = '{DFLT, 32'hEE};
      |                                           ^~
%Error: t/t_array_pattern_concat.v:30:43: Assignment pattern missed initializing elements: 3
                                        : ... note: In instance 't'
   30 |    localparam logic [31:0] WITH_DFLT[4] = '{DFLT, 32'hEE};
      |                                           ^~
%Error: t/t_array_pattern_concat.v:33:38: Assignment pattern missed initializing elements: 3
                                        : ... note: In instance 't'
   33 |    localparam logic [31:0] TAIL[4] = '{32'hAA, 32'hBB, BASE_ADDRS[1:2]};
      |                                      ^~
%Error: t/t_array_pattern_concat.v:36:45: Assignment pattern missed initializing elements: 2
                                        : ... note: In instance 't'
   36 |    localparam logic [31:0] MULTI_SLICE[4] = '{BASE_ADDRS[0:1], BASE_ADDRS[1:2]};
      |                                             ^~
%Error: t/t_array_pattern_concat.v:36:45: Assignment pattern missed initializing elements: 3
                                        : ... note: In instance 't'
   36 |    localparam logic [31:0] MULTI_SLICE[4] = '{BASE_ADDRS[0:1], BASE_ADDRS[1:2]};
      |                                             ^~
%Error: t/t_array_pattern_concat.v:43:43: Assignment pattern missed initializing elements: 3
                                        : ... note: In instance 't'
   43 |    localparam logic [31:0] WITH_DESC[4] = '{DESC[1:0], 32'hAA, 32'hBB};
      |                                           ^~
%Error: t/t_array_pattern_concat.v:47:45: Assignment pattern missed initializing elements: 3
                                        : ... note: In instance 't'
   47 |    localparam logic [31:0] PARAM_SLICE[4] = '{BASE_ADDRS[0:N-1], 32'hAA, 32'hBB};
      |                                             ^~
%Error: t/t_array_pattern_concat.v:55:46: Assignment pattern missed initializing elements: 2
                                        : ... note: In instance 't'
   55 |    localparam logic [31:0] COMPOSED[TOTAL] = '{SRC_A[0:NA-1], SRC_B[0:NB-1]};
      |                                              ^~
%Error: t/t_array_pattern_concat.v:55:46: Assignment pattern missed initializing elements: 3

      |                                              ^~

                                        : ... note: In instance 't'
   55 |    localparam logic [31:0] COMPOSED[TOTAL] = '{SRC_A[0:NA-1], SRC_B[0:NB-1]};
      |                                              ^~
%Error: Exiting due to 15 error(s)
```

>What 'verilator --version' are you using?  Did you try it with the git master version?  Did you try it with other simulators?
latest master
```plain
Verilator 5.047 devel rev vUNKNOWN-built20260410
```

> What OS and distribution are you using?

Linux (ubuntu 24.04) under docker on apple silicon

> May we assist you in trying to fix this in Verilator yourself?

Sure, I've got an initial PR ready to open against this issue.

[t_array_pattern_concat.v.txt](https://github.com/user-attachments/files/26627196/t_array_pattern_concat.v.txt)
